The musical's final performance will be dedicated to the Asian American and Pacific Islanders community.

By Logan Culwell-Block | December 6, 2022
Receipts fell overall following a Thanksgiving week-high, even as The Phantom of the Opera continues to play to sold-out houses.
Jesse Williams on How Broadway's Take Me Out Is a Critique of Toxic Masculinity
By Diep Tran | December 6, 2022
The Tony-nominated star steps up to the plate, again, in the encore engagement of Richard Greenberg's play.
VIDEO
Lea Michele Has Heard From Barbra Streisand About Funny Girl
By Logan Culwell-Block | December 6, 2022
The Glee star stopped by Late Night With Seth Meyers to share what her idol had to say about taking on the role that made Streisand a worldwide star.

Broadway's Into the Woods Revival Will Journey Across the U.S. On Tour
By Talaura Harms | December 6, 2022
Montego Glover, Stephanie J. Block, Sebastian Arcelus, and Gavin Creel are among the cast who will take the show on tour.

The New York Times Responds to KPOP Review Controversy
By Logan Culwell-Block | December 6, 2022
The statement follows a request from the musical's producers for an apology following what they describe as "casual racism" in Jesse Green's review.
